title: Comparison of Sequential Search Optimization Methods
description: A flowchart comparing the initial setup and iterative steps of the 3-point and Fibonacci search methods for finding the minimum of a unimodal function.
relationships: 3-Point Search uses fixed, symmetric interior points
Fibonacci Search uses points based on the Fibonacci sequence to minimize maximum function evaluations
Both methods iteratively narrow the interval containing the minimum by comparing function values
The process repeats until the interval length is less than the specified tolerance
